GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  NA:(0,-1/2,1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM:(0,0,0)  X:(1,1,1)  R:(1/2,0,1/2)  S:(0,1/2,1/2)  W:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  T:(1/2,1/2,0)
